en_title: Rayman Legends Retold First Preview: A Remake With 3D Art and 2D Action
cn_title: 《雷曼：传奇》重制版前瞻：3D画面2D玩法
subtitle: 经典重制，乐趣依旧
opus_summary: 育碧公布了《雷曼：传奇》的重制版《雷曼：传奇 复述》，保留原版2D动作玩法，采用Snowdrop引擎重制3D画面。新增音乐关卡、多人模式及全新第六世界。游戏将于10月1日登陆PS5、Xbox Series、Switch 2和PC，Switch 2版稳定60帧。

paragraphs.en: Thinking back to the original release of Rayman Legends back in 2013 , there isn’t much I would change about it. Slick 2D action platforming with a good mix of heady puzzles and shmup sequences – when executed well, those kinds of things can hold up over time. And Ubisoft would agree, because after getting my hands on the upcoming remake in Rayman Legends Retold, I know first-hand that it plays exactly as you’d expect since the core gameplay hasn't really been touched (although there is a lot of new content). But as much as I believe the painterly pre-rendered art style of the original didn't necessarily need a makeover, Ubisoft seemed to put in painstaking effort in recreating Rayman Legends with a modern visual overhaul, bringing the same 2D action into a new 3D world.
paragraphs.cn: 回想2013年《雷曼：传奇》原版发售时，我几乎挑不出什么毛病。流畅的2D动作平台跳跃，搭配巧妙的谜题和射击关卡——只要做得好，这类游戏经得起时间考验。育碧也同意这一点，因为在我上手了即将推出的重制版《雷曼：传奇 复述》后，我亲身体验到它的手感完全符合预期，核心玩法基本没变（尽管新增了大量内容）。虽然我认为原版那种绘画风格的预渲染美术并不需要翻新，但育碧似乎不遗余力地用现代视觉技术重制了《雷曼：传奇》，将同样的2D动作带入了全新的3D世界。

paragraphs.en: To be abundantly clear, Rayman Legends Retold is not a 3D platformer – it is still the 2D action you may have played, or at least seen. This time around, its worlds, backgrounds, and foregrounds have changed significantly, with modern graphical sensibilities that I would almost describe as playing through a Dreamworks animated film. I say that because of the style and tone of Rayman's cartoonish low-brow goofiness that works well enough for what the series is, and that comes through clearly with the new cutscenes and fully voiced dialogue. Rayman doesn't need to be much more than a lighthearted romp with fart jokes, silly pop culture references, and some nebulous evil entity terrorizing frogs. Listen, I don't mind someone just jingling keys in front of me, I'm not above that!
paragraphs.cn: 需要明确的是，《雷曼：传奇 复述》并非3D平台游戏——它仍然是你可能玩过或至少见过的2D动作玩法。这一次，其世界、背景和前景都发生了显著变化，具有现代图形质感，我几乎可以形容为在玩一部梦工厂动画电影。我这么说，是因为雷曼那种卡通化、低俗搞笑的风格和基调，恰好符合这个系列的特点，而新的过场动画和全语音对话清晰地展现了这一点。雷曼不需要太多，只需一场轻松愉快的闹剧，配上放屁笑话、愚蠢的流行文化梗，以及某个模糊的邪恶实体恐吓青蛙。听着，我不介意有人在我面前晃钥匙逗我，我还没那么高雅！

paragraphs.en: Now if you haven't played Rayman Legends, it's a solid 2D action platformer starring Ubisoft's long-time limbless protagonist that came with a good variety of hearty challenges that helped it stand out within a crowded genre. I got to play about two hours of this remake when I visited the studio at Ubisoft Montpellier, and I was happy to see that it's held up quite well all these years later. Running, wall-jumping, swinging on vines, and avoiding deadly hazards are of course the traditions of the genre, but it's the pace at which it throws these things at you, with the same tight controls, that builds a good sense of momentum.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你没玩过《雷曼：传奇》，它是一款扎实的2D动作平台游戏，主角是育碧长期以来的无肢英雄，游戏提供了丰富多样的挑战，使其在拥挤的品类中脱颖而出。我在访问育碧蒙彼利埃工作室时试玩了大约两个小时的重制版，很高兴看到它这么多年后依然表现良好。奔跑、蹬墙跳、荡藤蔓、躲避致命危险，这些当然是该类型的传统，但正是它向你抛出这些元素的节奏，加上同样紧凑的操作，营造出良好的动感。

paragraphs.en: The best example of this is in the "Invaded" versions of normal levels, which turns things into a time-attack run where completing it under a certain time means you save more Teensies, which are these blue little freakos who inhabit the world. Retry after retry, I was able to get the fastest time necessary in all the available levels by understanding how Rayman's momentum carries when speedrunning, the timing of each jump to keep pace, and the way attacks carry you past obstacles. It can be frustrating, but it's the kind that makes you want to complete it because you're either so close or you see exactly what you did wrong.
paragraphs.cn: 最好的例子是普通关卡的「入侵」版本，它将游戏变成限时跑酷，在规定时间内完成就能拯救更多「小精灵」——那些居住在世界中的蓝色小怪胎。一次又一次重试，我通过理解雷曼在速通时的动量传递、每次跳跃的时机以保持节奏，以及攻击如何带你越过障碍，最终在所有可用关卡中取得了最快时间。这可能会令人沮丧，但正是那种让你想要完成它的挫折感，因为你要么差一点就成功，要么清楚地看到自己哪里做错了。

paragraphs.en: This was most true in the Enchanted Forest level where a ghost of Rayman shadows your every movement, forcing you to avoid him lest you die. But there's specific jump timing, hostile frogs parachuting in you need to bounce off of, and spiky platforms paired with an updraft that'll send you into the spikes if you're not careful. You have to string all of this in one run, but piecing it all together with each retry was as much about being smart as it was about pure execution.
paragraphs.cn: 这在「魔法森林」关卡中尤为明显，一个雷曼的幽灵会模仿你的每一个动作，迫使你避开它，否则就会死亡。但这里有特定的跳跃时机、需要你弹跳的伞降敌蛙，以及配合上升气流的尖刺平台，如果不小心就会被吹到尖刺上。你必须在一轮跑酷中串联所有这些要素，而每次重试时将它们拼凑起来，既需要智慧，也需要纯粹的执行力。

paragraphs.en: The main levels aren't quite as treacherous as this, but later on in the Stinkbog, the second zone with a batch of swamp-themed levels, the updraft mechanic adds variety to the normal 2D platforming, asking you to avoid thorny vines as you control Rayman's helicopter hair while dodging enemies and saving Teensies along the way. There are also these wild dragon-riding levels that turn Rayman Legends into a Star Fox-style rail shooter – these are simple at first, just having you dodge incoming obstacles and blast fireballs at everything in front of you. But it's when things turn into a 2D shmup I really enjoyed; it's not exactly difficult, but it's a super fun and seamless way to keep the twists coming, preventing the experience from getting repetitive or predictable.
paragraphs.cn: 主线关卡没有这么凶险，但在后面的「臭沼」——第二个区域，有一批沼泽主题关卡——上升气流机制为普通的2D平台跳跃增添了变化，要求你在控制雷曼的直升机头发时避开荆棘藤蔓，同时躲避敌人并沿途拯救小精灵。还有一些狂野的骑龙关卡，将《雷曼：传奇》变成了《星际火狐》风格的轨道射击游戏——起初很简单，只需躲避迎面而来的障碍物，并向面前的一切发射火球。但真正让我享受的是当它变成2D射击游戏时；虽然不算困难，但这是保持变化不断、防止体验变得重复或可预测的一种超级有趣且无缝的方式。

paragraphs.en: I also quite enjoyed the short challenge rooms tucked within levels where you're tasked with manipulating the environment in a clever way to save extra Teensies at the end of the room. One such example had Rayman hanging on to hooks inside of a massive wheel with spikes inside its maze-like innards. In order to progress through the room, you have to rotate the wheel using the companion character Murphy, then line up your drops and jumps all while within an inch of danger. These kinds of tasks break up the pace nicely, and made me seek them out carefully since they're easy to miss within the normal levels.
paragraphs.cn: 我也很喜欢隐藏在关卡中的短挑战房间，你的任务是以巧妙的方式操纵环境，在房间尽头拯救额外的小精灵。其中一个例子是雷曼挂在一个巨大轮子内部的钩子上，轮子迷宫般的内脏里有尖刺。为了通过房间，你必须使用同伴角色墨菲旋转轮子，然后在危险边缘调整下落和跳跃。这类任务很好地打破了节奏，让我仔细寻找它们，因为在普通关卡中很容易错过。

paragraphs.en: In just two hours with Rayman Legends Retold, I saw so much variation that may seem subtle until you look back on all the different things it's doing. And all these ideas flow into each other smoothly at a brisk pace. It's not a complex game that's going to work your brain intensely or have nail-biting difficulty, it's pleasant and silly fun that's tuned just right to keep itself engaging throughout. I'm not sure I vibe with its characters like the Bubble Dreamer, who's kind of a cheesy hippy stereotype, or the peanut-brained Globox, but like, whatever man! It's goofy fun even if I think a lot of it is pretty corny.
paragraphs.cn: 仅仅两个小时的《雷曼：传奇 复述》，我就看到了如此多的变化，这些变化可能看似微妙，直到你回顾它所做的所有不同事情。所有这些想法都以轻快的节奏流畅地相互融合。这不是一款需要你绞尽脑汁或难度令人捏一把汗的复杂游戏，它是一种愉快而愚蠢的乐趣，调校得恰到好处，让你始终保持投入。我不确定自己是否喜欢「泡泡梦想家」这样的角色——他有点俗气的嬉皮士刻板印象——或者「花生脑」格洛博克斯，但管他呢！这是一种傻乎乎的乐趣，尽管我觉得其中很多内容相当老套。

paragraphs.en: I'd be remiss not to mention more of the new content that bolsters Rayman Legends Retold as more than just a one-to-one remake. Musical levels are back with four new ones to boot; these are a bit gimmicky, but neat little diversions – timed platforming runs to the tune of covers of licensed songs with obstacles timed to the beat. I played one that was backed by MC Hammer's "U Can't Touch This" – which I'm not sure what it's doing in Rayman, but…cool! Kung Foot is back as well, but now has numerous options to make this 2v2 combat soccer minigame more interesting. You can adjust the platform layouts and control what kind of powerups drop – like zero gravity, goal shields, goal switching, etc. I played a handful of matches during my studio visit, and to think Rayman has a solid little multiplayer mode alongside everything else further speaks to the wacky yet fun ideas Rayman Legends Retold packs into a single game.
paragraphs.cn: 如果不提更多新内容，那就是我的失职了，这些内容使《雷曼：传奇 复述》不仅仅是一款一比一的重制版。音乐关卡回归，并新增了四个；这些关卡有点噱头，但却是 neat 的小调剂——在授权歌曲的翻唱旋律中进行的限时平台跑酷，障碍物与节拍同步。我玩了一个以MC Hammer的《U Can't Touch This》为背景音乐的关卡——我不确定这首歌为什么会出现在雷曼中，但……酷！「功夫脚」也回归了，但现在有众多选项让这款2v2战斗足球小游戏更有趣。你可以调整平台布局，控制掉落的道具类型——比如零重力、球门护盾、球门切换等。我在工作室访问期间玩了几场比赛，想到雷曼在众多内容之外还拥有一个扎实的小型多人模式，这进一步说明了《雷曼：传奇 复述》在一个游戏中塞入了多少古怪而有趣的点子。

paragraphs.en: Thinking about the visual overhaul broadly, it felt like one of those cases where "this is how I remembered it looking back in the day," and when you look at the original, it's definitely not the case. Ubisoft Montpellier and Ubisoft Milan used the original levels and visuals as a reference to then expand on it, adding details that give extra depth to its 2D gameplay. So, when it comes to the remade levels, everything is in place as it was in the original – the developers even showed us a side-by-side comparison of both versions being controlled with one controller, and it all played out the same. Bringing the old levels into the Snowdrop engine (the same one used in all other modern Ubisoft games) allows for that higher fidelity, and I hope the rest of Retold makes good use of it – we'll see in that brand-new sixth realm with extra levels toward the ending, which Ubisoft has confirmed. I mean, the new dragon-riding levels feel almost like a theme park ride within a 2D platformer, and it's a microcosm of the kind of spectacle this new art style can bring. And it holds up quite well on Nintendo Switch 2, keeping a solid 60 fps, which Ubisoft credits to the work it did and lessons learned with the Star Wars Outlaws port.
paragraphs.cn: 从整体视觉翻新来看，这感觉就像是那种「这就是我记忆中当年的样子」的情况，但当你看到原版时，显然并非如此。育碧蒙彼利埃和育碧米兰以原版关卡和视觉为参考，在此基础上进行扩展，添加了为2D玩法增添深度的细节。因此，在重制关卡中，一切与原版位置相同——开发者甚至向我们展示了用一个手柄控制两个版本的并排对比，两者玩起来完全一样。将旧关卡带入Snowdrop引擎（所有其他现代育碧游戏使用的同一引擎）实现了更高的保真度，我希望《复述》的其余部分能充分利用它——我们将在全新的第六领域（育碧已确认）中看到，该领域在结局前有额外关卡。我的意思是，新的骑龙关卡感觉就像2D平台游戏中的主题公园 ride，它是这种新美术风格所能带来的奇观的一个缩影。它在任天堂Switch 2上表现相当不错，保持稳定的60帧，育碧将其归功于在《星球大战：亡命之徒》移植工作中所做的工作和吸取的教训。

paragraphs.en: I'm not always fond of the constant remaking of games that don't necessarily need a remake, especially if it's not going to be a fundamental rethinking of the source material. And taking a distinct, somewhat whimsical 2D art style and making it denser in 3D doesn't automatically make it look "better" per se. But I think Rayman Legends Retold is just imaginative enough to separate itself from the original. And in a way, it's a modern throwback once again, just like it was in 2013. With the new content on top of it and the quality-of-life tweaks like a more navigable overworld to make it a smoother experience, I can see how it distinguishes itself to warrant a remake. And with four-player co-op returning, it's not something you see very often.
paragraphs.cn: 我并不总是喜欢对那些并不需要重制的游戏进行不断重制，尤其是当它不会对原始素材进行根本性重新思考时。将一种独特、有些异想天开的2D美术风格变得在3D中更密集，本身并不会自动让它看起来「更好」。但我认为《雷曼：传奇 复述》足够富有想象力，足以与原版区分开来。从某种意义上说，它再次成为一款现代复古作品，就像2013年那样。加上新内容和生活质量调整（如更易导航的大地图），使其体验更流畅，我能看出它如何脱颖而出，值得重制。而且四人合作模式回归，这在如今并不常见。

paragraphs.en: I do hope this is more of a stepping stone for a wholly new Rayman or something similar in this vein. After all, Ubisoft Montpellier was the team behind the outstanding Prince of Persia: The Lost Crown from 2024, which I still think is a very high bar for modern 2D action. So, a remake of a game that wasn't in dire need of one can't be all they have cooking up, right? And perhaps this work using the Snowdrop engine paves the way for something bigger.
paragraphs.cn: 我确实希望这更像是全新《雷曼》或类似作品的垫脚石。毕竟，育碧蒙彼利埃是2024年出色的《波斯王子：失落的王冠》背后的团队，我仍然认为该作为现代2D动作游戏树立了很高的标杆。所以，一款并非急需重制的游戏的重制版不可能是他们正在酝酿的全部，对吧？也许使用Snowdrop引擎的这项工作为更大的项目铺平了道路。

paragraphs.en: For now, though, you can expect Rayman Legends Retold to launch on October 1 this year for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC.
paragraphs.cn: 不过目前，《雷曼：传奇 复述》将于今年10月1日登陆PlayStation 5、Xbox Series X|S、任天堂Switch 2和PC。

paragraphs.en: Michael Higham is an editor at IGN who regularly contributes with reviews, previews, features, and news in written and video form. He's usually entrusted with covering long RPGs and tech products, but he's got range when it comes to games. You'll also catch him at events and hosting video content, including IGN's weekly podcast Unlocked .
paragraphs.cn: 迈克尔·海厄姆是IGN的编辑，定期以文字和视频形式撰写评测、前瞻、专题和新闻。他通常负责报道长篇RPG和技术产品，但在游戏方面也涉猎广泛。你还会在活动中看到他，并主持视频内容，包括IGN的每周播客《Unlocked》。
